Aspire.DefaultConnection: Under AppHost, ConnectionStrings__Default is injected via WithReference(PostgresDatabase, Default). This file is the fallback for standalone Development and EF tooling. Use Host=127.0.0.1, Port equal to devPostgresPublishedPort in AppHost.cs (5432), Database equal to AddDatabase(postgresDatabaseName) for this service, and credentials matching AppHost postgres parameters.
Aspire.StandalonePostgres: Same Port as AppHost devPostgresPublishedPort; from the host OS this is the published TCP port (dashboard if not 5432).
